name: Puff Town
short_description: This is a casual board game that requires walking by rolling dice with the goal of reaching the finish line when the catnip runs out.
detailed_description:
The game introduction

This is a casual board game that requires walking by rolling dice with the goal of reaching the finish line when the catnip runs out.

Game shows

Click the dice with the mouse, the random number is a few characters will move a few steps.

Game elements

Monster:If you encounter a monster, you will be robbed of cat grass.
Amusement:Amusement facilities will consume cat grass.
Transportation:When a trap is encountered, it will fall back a few squares.
Trap:Vehicles, encounter will advance a few grid.
The cat grass:Get cat grass.

Game style

Cute, exquisite
